content: solana-py (michaelhly/solana-py) is actively maintained and built on top of solders (re-exports solders types for Keypair/Pubkey/Transaction). Not deprecated. Provides AsyncClient (httpx-based) and websocket_api (websockets-based) convenience wrappers around JSON-RPC. Adds an extra dependency layer vs hand-rolling RPC/WS directly with solders+httpx+websockets.
